title: cyphomandra velloziana
intro: Cyphomandra velloziana, also known as the Guanabani or Strawberry Tree, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Cyphomandra velloziana include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
